findings: README documents recovery at high level: monitor stuck detection, orchestrator re-queue on agent death
Docs mention stuck-agent detection but not threshold or automatic action
Documented CLI flags minimal: --teardown documented, no --restart/--resume
Docs do not match runtime: README claims PID-based recovery but impl uses tmux pane state
Code implements alert-only stuck detection (120s bell), not auto-restart
Undocumented features: orphan-task recovery, partial completion, missing-task reporting
README inaccurately describes dead-agent recovery mechanism
